schema_note: Each goal contains objectives, and each objective contains initiatives (target + implementation activities + follow-up indicators) along with the timeframe, the party responsible for implementation, the party responsible for monitoring, and funding.

goals.title: Producing distinguished graduates qualified to compete locally and internationally

initiatives.target: Selecting top performers among high-school graduates, equivalency-certificate holders, and academically/athletically distinguished students from all governorates of Egypt and from international applicants
activities: Introducing students to the Faculty
Intensifying the posting of Faculty news and student activities on social media
indicators: Intensity of posting Faculty news and student activities on social media
Number of field visits to schools
Number of open days held
Number of students and parents attending the open day

initiatives.target: Providing scholarships for capable students to attract and motivate them to enroll at the Faculty
activities: Announcing the scholarships offered
Announcing the application mechanism
Forming committees to select eligible scholarship recipients
indicators: Number of students who received scholarships
initiatives.implementation_responsible: University Scholarship Committee and Student Affairs Administration

initiatives.target: Integration between scientific research and education
activities: Encouraging undergraduate students to engage in scientific research activities
Participation in international competitions
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Research groups and student activity at the university

initiatives.target: Providing logistical needs
activities: Providing subscriptions to transportation services (university buses)
Maintaining students' security and safety
Providing food and beverage outlets under university oversight
Helping students secure housing near the university
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Student Affairs Administration; Auxiliary Services, Health and Occupational Safety Administration

objectives.title: Continuous development of programs to keep pace with global progress

initiatives.target: Having programs and courses specified and accredited according to quality standards — updating program regulations to meet industry needs and technological developments
activities: Identifying the update required for each set of regulations and implementing it
Conducting internal and external review of programs and courses
Preparing annual reports on programs and courses to identify strengths and weaknesses and develop an improvement plan

initiatives.target: Introducing new programs linked to market needs and keeping pace with global requirements
activities: Introducing new programs linked to market needs and keeping pace with global requirements
indicators: Number of new programs approved by the university
Number of new programs that have been launched

objectives.title: Providing a suitable environment for educational, cultural, and sports activities
objectives.objective_target: Ensuring the continuity of student excellence through a strong internet network, updated labs and halls, sports fields, and support for faculty members' capabilities

initiatives.target: Supporting and enhancing the university's digital transformation
activities: Using learning management systems and internationally reputable student information systems
Providing electronic communication systems
indicators: Percentage of students and faculty members using the system
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Technical Support Administration and the Training Committee

initiatives.target: Training faculty members, supporting staff, and administrators on information management systems
activities: Training faculty members, supporting staff, and administrators on information management systems
indicators: Faculty members and supporting staff who have been trained
Administrators who have been trained
Percentage of users of these systems after attending training

initiatives.target: Developing infrastructure suitable for educational, cultural, and sports activities
activities: Developing infrastructure suitable for educational, cultural, and sports activities
indicators: Availability of equipped halls
Provision of updated labs
Signed and active maintenance contracts
New and modern equipment
Availability of diverse sports fields
Upgrading halls to allow for remote/distance learning

initiatives.target: Developing scientific mechanisms and methods for crisis, risk, and disaster management
activities: Developing scientific mechanisms and methods for crisis, risk, and disaster management
indicators: Existence of a crisis-response plan
Spreading a culture of crisis management among stakeholders: students – staff – faculty members and supporting staff
Completing security and safety equipment at the Faculty
Training on crisis response

objectives.title: Enhancing graduates' competitive capabilities
objectives.objective_target: Having students with leadership and creative qualifications

initiatives.target: Building students' leadership character and involving them in the decision-making process
activities: Engaging students as research assistants and teaching assistants
Involving student representatives in quality committees
Engaging students in organizing scientific events
Existence of numerous scientific and cultural clubs

initiatives.target: Encouraging the Student Union to play an active role in Faculty activities
activities: Encouraging the Student Union to play an active role in Faculty activities
indicators: Number of students seeking to join the Student Union
Periodic meetings with the Student Union to hear their views and proposed ideas

initiatives.target: Providing an environment that encourages students toward debate and free discussion
activities: Organizing numerous cultural, scientific, and social events
Discussing students' feedback and responding to it
indicators: Percentage of student participation in various events
Number of students participating in opinion surveys

initiatives.target: Giving students the opportunity to study humanities courses that encourage thinking, creativity, and critique
activities: Including elective courses such as critical thinking
Including elective courses to develop artistic sense
Existence of debate-simulation activities and their analysis

objectives.title: Linking education to scientific research
objectives.objective_target: Qualifying undergraduate students to engage in scientific research activities and keep pace with global developments

initiatives.target: Adopting an educational policy based on students undertaking applied projects through their coursework
activities: Courses including applied projects as part of assessment requirements
Engaging students in research forums through these projects

initiatives.target: Encouraging undergraduate students toward scientific publishing
activities: Encouraging undergraduate students toward scientific publishing
indicators: Number of students participating in research
Number of peer-reviewed papers published

objectives.title: Qualifying students to join student-exchange programs and international research labs

initiatives.target: Activating student-exchange programs and dual-degree programs
activities: Activating student-exchange programs and dual-degree programs
indicators: Number of active student-exchange agreements
Number of dual-program agreements

initiatives.target: Raising students' awareness of the importance of student exchange and offering the available opportunities
activities: Raising students' awareness of the importance of student exchange and offering the available opportunities
indicators: Number of students benefiting from available opportunities
Number of seminars held and number of attending students
Number of announced student-exchange programs

initiatives.target: Nominating students, following up with them, and evaluating their personal experiences
activities: Nominating students, following up with them, and evaluating their personal experiences
indicators: Number of personal interviews with students to assess their suitability for the requirements
Assessment of the benefit gained by participating students, the program's importance, and the feasibility of its continuation

goals.title: A faculty member and supporting staff member distinguished scientifically, in research, and in quality

objectives.title: Creating a flexible work environment that motivates teaching and scientific research

initiatives.target: Attracting talent by providing material capabilities that enable teaching and scientific research practice — establishing and updating specialized labs at the Faculty
activities: Establishing and updating specialized labs at the Faculty
indicators: Specialized labs established
Labs updated

initiatives.target: Equipping sufficient lecture halls and teaching rooms, and updating and maintaining them
activities: Adding and equipping lecture halls and teaching rooms
Responding to maintenance requests
Signed and active maintenance contracts

initiatives.target: Updating library content according to the Faculty's teaching and research requirements
activities: Updating library content according to the Faculty's teaching and research requirements
indicators: Diversity of services offered by the library
Response rate to faculty members' requests for books and references

initiatives.target: Measuring the satisfaction of faculty members and supporting staff
activities: Measuring the satisfaction of faculty members and supporting staff
indicators: Number of surveys of faculty members, supporting staff, and administrators
Procedures followed to address dissatisfaction points identified from the surveys

initiatives.target: Motivating and helping faculty members apply for research projects internally and externally
activities: Motivating and helping faculty members apply for research projects internally and externally
indicators: Following up on calls for research proposals and funding bodies
Number of projects submitted by faculty members
Number of funded projects
Procedures followed to support faculty members
initiatives.monitoring_responsible: Dean and Director of the Research Center

initiatives.target: Motivating and helping faculty members supervise research students
activities: Motivating and helping faculty members supervise research students
indicators: Number of research students per faculty member
Procedures followed to help and motivate research students
Number of graduate courses per faculty member
initiatives.monitoring_responsible: Dean, Director of the Research Center, and graduate-program directors

objectives.title: Implementing a clear system for appointment and evaluation, defining responsibilities, and updating the organizational structure to fit the Faculty's goals and needs

initiatives.target: Organizing institutional work — setting specific, measurable criteria that ensure transparency in distributing roles and responsibilities
activities: Setting and announcing job descriptions
Announcing the organizational structure

initiatives.target: Appointing new, qualified members
activities: Announcing required positions
Setting weighted criteria for appointment
indicators: Number of applicants
Number of personal interviews

initiatives.target: Activating an administrative and faculty performance-evaluation system
activities: Setting an approved, transparent and objective accountability document
Availability of performance evaluation reports

initiatives.target: Promotion systems, evaluation criteria, and performance follow-up
activities: Announcing the evaluation mechanism and criteria
Performance-evaluation committees for faculty members, supporting staff, and administrators
Setting a clear promotion system following the rules of the Supreme Council of Universities
Setting a clear promotion system for administrators
Setting and announcing a grievance mechanism

initiatives.target: Insurance and pension systems
activities: Announcing policies for dealing with retired faculty members
Contracting with an internationally reputable health-insurance company

objectives.title: Raising the efficiency of faculty members and supporting staff to maintain the quality of the educational process and scientific research

initiatives.target: Identifying training tracks and target groups for each
activities: Conducting surveys to identify the courses required for each target group
Setting the annual training plan
Diversifying training directions (scientific – administrative – quality)

initiatives.target: Implementing and following up on training courses (for faculty members, supporting staff, administrators, and Faculty staff)
activities: Implementing and following up on training courses
indicators: Number of training courses held annually
Participation rate in the courses
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Faculty members, supporting staff, and administrators

goals.title: Impactful scientific research and engagement with leading universities and scientists locally and internationally

objectives.title: Encouraging faculty members toward scientific research and innovation

initiatives.target: Setting a documented, approved research plan for the Faculty to raise the quality of research
activities: Setting a research plan
indicators: Existence of a documented and approved research plan
Published research follows the research plan

initiatives.target: Forming distinguished research groups to support innovation
activities: Forming distinguished research groups to support innovation
indicators: Existence of active research groups
Publication of joint scientific papers
Existence of joint research projects
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Director of the Informatics Center and faculty members

initiatives.target: Providing the appropriate material and scientific resources to meet research requirements
activities: Number of internal research projects
Covering international-publication costs
Granting rewards for research papers published in international journals
Offering partial scholarships ranging between 10% and 30% for graduate students
Offering full scholarships as well as a monthly salary for research assistants
Providing strong network infrastructure for information services

initiatives.target: Encouraging and supporting scientific research activities
activities: The Faculty includes a specialized research center
Periodic workshops for professors and graduate students specifically for scientific research
Holding periodic research forums for undergraduates, graduate students, and researchers, and defining the participation mechanism
Supporting students to participate in forums appropriately
Making forum outputs available for general benefit

initiatives.target: Supporting publication and participation in international journals and conferences
activities: Supporting publication and participation in international journals and conferences
indicators: Organizing a mechanism to announce conferences and research activities
Number of international conferences participated in
Number of papers presented at conferences
Existence of a clear policy regarding cash support for publishing scientific papers
Number of forums organized
Number of participants

objectives.title: Strengthening partnership programs with distinguished international and local universities

initiatives.target: Signing cooperation protocols with distinguished universities to support the Faculty's international presence
activities: Establishing and supporting an International Relations Committee
indicators: Number of cooperation protocols
Number of beneficiaries

initiatives.target: Applying for joint research projects
activities: Applying for joint research projects
indicators: Number of joint research projects
Number of faculty members and supporting staff participating in these projects

objectives.title: Attracting our expatriate scientists to raise the quality of the educational and research process

initiatives.target: Inviting our expatriate scientists to participate in the Faculty's scientific activities
activities: Inviting our expatriate scientists to participate in the Faculty's scientific activities
indicators: Number of conferences and forums our expatriate scientists participate in
Number of expatriate scientists invited to participate in organizing committees, to attend, and to deliver public lectures

initiatives.target: Engaging our expatriate scientists in research projects
activities: Engaging our expatriate scientists in research projects
indicators: Number of our expatriate scientists' contributions to submitted projects
Number of ongoing projects

initiatives.target: Engaging our expatriate scientists in teaching graduate courses
activities: Engaging our expatriate scientists in teaching graduate courses
indicators: Number of courses our expatriate scientists teach
Number of students enrolled in courses taught by our expatriate scientists
Student evaluation of courses taught by our expatriate scientists

initiatives.target: Inviting our expatriate scientists to participate in supervising and evaluating theses
activities: Inviting our expatriate scientists to participate in supervising and evaluating theses
indicators: Number of our expatriate scientists' contributions to thesis supervision
Number of our expatriate scientists' contributions to thesis examination committees

goals.title: Supporting the information-technology industry and contributing to solving local and international problems through community engagement

objectives.title: Effective participation in national projects to strengthen the Faculty's role in the community

initiatives.target: Activating joint research projects with relevant bodies
activities: Activating joint research projects with relevant bodies
indicators: Number of research projects submitted serving national projects
Percentage of submitted projects linked to Egypt's Vision 2030
Number of funded research projects

initiatives.target: Directing scientific research to serve national projects
activities: Directing scientific research to serve national projects
indicators: Number of research papers submitted serving national projects
Percentage of submitted research linked to Egypt's Vision 2030

objectives.title: Participating in community development in the field of information technology (advancing the IT community)

initiatives.target: Inviting relevant community parties to participate in the Faculty's Advisory Board
activities: Inviting relevant community parties to participate in the Faculty's Advisory Board
indicators: Number of community and industry parties represented on the Advisory Board

initiatives.target: Offering professional diplomas to raise staff competency
activities: Offering professional diplomas to raise staff competency
indicators: Number of professional diplomas
Number of enrolled students

initiatives.target: Spreading an information-technology culture
activities: Number of hackathon events
Number of seminars held
Summer activities and programming courses

objectives.title: Cooperation with the information-technology industry sector

initiatives.target: Cooperating with companies to solve industry problems through scientific research
activities: Cooperating with companies to solve industry problems through scientific research
indicators: Number of companies collaborated with on research
Number of companies collaborated with to adopt graduation projects

initiatives.target: Solving industry problems through theses and graduation projects
activities: Solving industry problems through theses and graduation projects
indicators: Number of graduation projects relevant to the community

objectives.title: Spreading the concept of entrepreneurship and a culture of self-employment
objectives.objective_target: Enabling students to establish their own ventures

initiatives.target: Raising awareness of the concept of entrepreneurship and its components
activities: Raising awareness of the concept of entrepreneurship and its components
indicators: Number of training programs and workshops offered
Number of students participating in training programs and workshops

initiatives.target: Preparing students to form their own startups through the university's entrepreneurship incubators
activities: Preparing students to form their own startups through the university's entrepreneurship incubators
indicators: Number of projects submitted by students
Number of incubators that produced startups
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Faculty members and the Entrepreneurship and Competitiveness Support Center

initiatives.target: Building an effective network of relationships with funding bodies to support entrepreneurs in successfully establishing and marketing their own ventures
activities: Building an effective network of relationships with funding bodies
indicators: Number of active cooperation agreements
Number of projects that received support
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Faculty members and the Entrepreneurship and Competitiveness Support Center

initiatives.target: Supporting startups
activities: Supporting startups
indicators: Number of projects that resulted in startups
Methods of support provided

objectives.title: Encouraging the conversion of scientific-research outputs into prototypes and supporting production and development

initiatives.target: Obtaining patents and intellectual-property rights — spreading a culture of intellectual property
activities: Spreading a culture of intellectual property
indicators: Number of awareness seminars held
Number of participants
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Faculty members and the Entrepreneurship and Competitiveness Support Center

initiatives.target: Supporting the acquisition of patents
activities: Supporting the acquisition of patents
indicators: Number of patent applications submitted
Number of registered patents
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Faculty members and the Entrepreneurship and Competitiveness Support Center

initiatives.target: Supporting applications to grant-making bodies to support access to prototypes
activities: Supporting applications to grant-making bodies to support access to prototypes
indicators: Number of projects submitted for funding
Number of projects that received funding
initiatives.implementation_responsible: Faculty members and the Entrepreneurship and Competitiveness Support Center
